title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: EO's documentary-style video chronicles Kalshi's founding and journey to a $22 billion valuation, emphasizing founders Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara's four-year fight against regulatory barriers and eventual legal action. The narrative positions prediction markets as infrastructure for price discovery and truth markets rather than gambling.
